accurate.why: All claims match the bill text; the 'Congressional Review Act' is the correct popular name for chapter 8 of title 5 cited in the resolution.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; naming the Congressional Review Act is accurate context, not a hallucination.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution disapproves the specified DOE appliance standards rule and renders it without force or effect.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies the action as nullifying a specific DOE rule and notes it does not amend other statutory text.

exceptions_conditions.why: The resolution contains no material exceptions or conditions; it simply disapproves the rule.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes approval on May 9, 2025, and that no additional effective dates are specified.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the resolution's sole operative effect: disapproving the rule so it has no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

concise.why: Brief and free of padding, though slightly repeats the rule title.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Department of Energy, the Congressional Review Act, and the rule title.

correct_figures.why: Federal Register citation (89 Fed. Reg. 81994), October 9, 2024, and May 9, 2025 approval date all match the bill text.
